Payments are handled off-site

    

  


  
  

    
    
Place your order on the site, follow the checkout instructions, then open a Discord ticket. A team member will confirm your order and send a payment link. Do not DM the bot directly — use the Create Ticket button in our Discord server.

          ▲ Read Before Ordering
          
Simple process

          
How It Works

          
Order in under a minute. No account needed.

          

            
01
Browse & Add to Cart
Pick your items and choose your flavors.

            
02
Checkout & Copy Order
Your order copies to clipboard automatically.

            
03
Open a Discord Ticket
Paste order + gift card code. Done.

          

          
We accept any Visa, Mastercard, or Amex gift card — fully private
